page_content:
COMM374 Communicating Visually: Message Production and Digital Media (3 Credits)

Focus on the interplay between technology, images and sound in

the creation of digital content. This is a communication process by which a digital visual message evolves from conception to completion, incorporating the creative, financial and marketing tools. Students will conceive, plan, recruit and supervise digital video projects, developing a familiarity with production management technique and execution. Restriction: Restricted to Communication Majors at the Universities at Shady Grove.
